     The Numbers Business Report

Blacklight (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $9,591,094Details
International Box Office $6,426,002
Worldwide Box Office $16,017,096
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $840,963
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,150,702
Total $1,991,665
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Travis Block lives and fights in the shadows. A freelance government “fixer,” Block is a dangerous man whose assignments have included extracting agents out of deep-cover situations. When Block discovers a shadowy program called Operation Unity is striking down ordinary citizens for reasons known only to Block’s boss, FBI chief Robinson, he enlists the help of a journalist, but his past and present collide when his daughter and granddaughter are threatened. Now Block needs to rescue the people he loves and expose the truth for a shot at redemption. Nothing and no one is safe when secrets are hidden in Blacklight.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$3,502,475 (36.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.74 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:59.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$29,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,772 opening theaters/2,772 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $10,893,587

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 11th, 2022 (Wide) by Briarcliff Entertainment
International Releases: February 10th, 2022 (Wide) (Australia)
February 10th, 2022 (Wide) (New Zealand)
February 23rd, 2022 (Wide), released as Игра теней (Russia (CIS))
February 24th, 2022 (Wide) (Netherlands)
February 25th, 2022 (Wide), released as Šešėlių žaidimas (Lithuania)
Video Release: April 19th, 2022 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for strong violence, action and language.
(Rating bulletin 2709 (cert #53520), 12/1/2021)
Running Time: 108 minutes
Plot point: Conspiracy Theory, Corrupt Cops, FBI, Undercover
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Briarcliff Entertainment, The Solution Entertainment Group, Sina Studios, Zero Gravity Management, Footloose Productions, Fourstar Films, Elevate Production Finance
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Travis Block lives and fights in the shadows. A freelance government “fixer,” Block is a dangerous man whose assignments have included extracting agents out of deep-cover situations. When Block discovers a shadowy program called Operation Unity is striking down ordinary citizens for reasons known only to Block’s boss, FBI chief Robinson, he enlists the help of a journalist, but his past and present collide when his daughter and granddaughter are threatened. Now Block needs to rescue the people he loves and expose the truth for a shot at redemption. Nothing and no one is safe when secrets are hidden in Blacklight.
